name: libmime-types-perl
title: libmime-types-perl
summary: Perl extension for determining MIME types and Transfer Encoding
description:
Perl extension for determining MIME types and Transfer Encoding
MIME::Types provides a start for a more detailed data-structure to keep
knowledge about various data types are defined by MIME. Some basic treatments
with mime types are implemented.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libmime-types-perl because Perl extension for determining MIME types and Transfer Encoding.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libmime-types-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libmime-types-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libmime-types-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
